final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, individuals should avoid crowded places and practice physical distancing of at least 1 metre [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]. Wearing a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible is also recommended [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]. Frequent hand washing with soap and water or using an alcohol-based hand rub is essential [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]. Keeping indoor spaces well ventilated can help reduce the spread of the virus [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]. Staying informed about local COVID-19 guidance and recommendations is crucial [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00029]. Getting vaccinated helps reduce the spread of the virus and the severity of illness [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]. Regularly cleaning and disinfecting frequently touched surfaces is also important [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00026]. Finally, individuals should quarantine if exposed to someone with COVID-19 to prevent further spread [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00129] and stay home if diagnosed or suspect they may be infected [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094].
